ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "repository_url" TEXT /* URL of the project's repository */,
  "programming_language" TEXT /* Programming language used in the project */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the project was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the project */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the project was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, archived) */,
  "lead_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project lead or manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_lead_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("lead_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, manager) */,
  "joined_date" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_metrics" (
  "project_metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project-metric link */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metrics record */,
  "commit_hash" TEXT /* Commit hash from version control */,
  "commit_date" TEXT /* Date of the commit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_metrics_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the project */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the project was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project related to the report */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_file" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "report_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report */,
  "generated_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_reports_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_reports_generated_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
